name: MacBook Pro 16" M3 Max
description: Supercharged by M3 Max chip, the MacBook Pro 16-inch delivers extraordinary performance for pro workflows. With up to 22 hours of battery life and a stunning Liquid Retina XDR display, it is the ultimate pro laptop.

name: Dell XPS 15 9530
description: The perfect balance of power and portability. The XPS 15 features an stunning OLED touch display, NVIDIA GeForce RTX graphics, and an elegant CNC aluminum design.

specifications.Processor: Intel Core i7-13700H (14-Core, up to 5.0 GHz)

name: iPhone 15 Pro Max
description: Forged in titanium and featuring the groundbreaking A17 Pro chip, a customizable Action button, and the most powerful iPhone camera system ever.

name: Samsung Galaxy S24 Ultra
description: Welcome to the era of mobile AI. With Galaxy S24 Ultra, unleash whole new levels of creativity, productivity and possibility, wrapped in titanium.

name: Apple Watch Ultra 2
description: The most rugged and capable Apple Watch. Designed for outdoor adventures and supercharged workouts, with a lightweight titanium case and up to 36 hours of battery life.

specifications.Battery Life: Up to 36 hours (72 hours in low power)
specifications.Sensors: Blood Oxygen, ECG, Temperature, Depth Gauge

name: Sony WH-1000XM5
description: Industry-leading active noise canceling headphones with exceptional sound quality, crystal-clear hands-free calling, and long-lasting comfort.

specifications.Battery Life: Up to 30 hours (ANC ON), 38 hours (ANC OFF)
specifications.Charging Time: Quick charge: 3 min for 3 hours playback

name: Bose QuietComfort Ultra
description: High-end wireless noise-cancelling headphones featuring breakthrough spatial audio for immersive listening, and custom-tuned noise cancellation.

specifications.Battery Life: Up to 24 hours (18 hours with Immersive Audio)
specifications.Sound Mode: Quiet Mode, Aware Mode, Immersion Mode

name: Keychron Q1 Pro
description: Full metal QMK/VIA custom mechanical keyboard. Designed with a double-gasket structure, CNC aluminum body, and wireless hot-swappable key switches.

name: Logitech MX Master 3S
description: An icon remastered. Feel every moment of your workflow with even more precision, tactile feedback, and silence using Quiet Clicks and an 8K DPI track-on-glass sensor.

specifications.Buttons: 7 Buttons with MagSpeed Electromagnetic Scroll Wheel
specifications.Battery Life: Up to 70 days on a full charge
specifications.Connectivity: Bluetooth Low Energy & Logi Bolt USB Receiver

name: Dell UltraSharp 32 4K USB-C Hub
description: Experience brilliant color and superior black performance with a contrast ratio of 2000:1 on the world's first 31.5-inch 4K monitor with IPS Black technology.

specifications.Ports: USB-C (90W Power Delivery), DisplayPort, HDMI, RJ45 Ethernet

name: Google Pixel 8 Pro
description: The all-pro phone engineered by Google. It has the best of Google AI, the most advanced Pixel Camera yet, and can even edit photos like magic.

name: ASUS ROG Zephyrus G14
description: Powerful, portable, and visually stunning. The Zephyrus G14 packs AMD Ryzen processors and RTX graphics in an ultra-sleek chassis with a gorgeous ROG Nebula Display.

name: Sennheiser Momentum 4 Wireless
description: Sennheiser's signature sound with class-leading 60-hour battery life. Features adaptive active noise cancellation and a refined fold-flat design.

specifications.Charging Time: 2 hours for full charge, 5 min for 4 hours playback

name: Samsung Galaxy Watch 6 Classic
description: The return of the rotating bezel. Track your workouts, monitor your sleep, and manage notifications with this classic stainless steel smartwatch.

specifications.Sensors: BioActive Sensor (HR, ECG, BIA), Temperature, Barometer

name: Logitech MX Keys S
description: Low-profile wireless keyboard crafted for comfort, speed, and precision, with smart illumination and fluid keys that match the shape of your fingertips.

specifications.Connectivity: Bluetooth Low Energy & Logi Bolt USB Receiver
specifications.Battery Life: Up to 10 days with backlight, 5 months without

name: Razer DeathAdder V3 Pro
description: Ultra-lightweight wireless ergonomic gaming mouse. Designed with esports pros for maximum comfort, 30K DPI optical sensor, and zero-latency wireless connectivity.

name: LG UltraGear 27" OLED Gaming Monitor
description: Unrivaled speed and visuals. The 240Hz refresh rate OLED screen delivers near-instant 0.03ms response times and deep, realistic contrast.

specifications.Adaptive Sync: NVIDIA G-SYNC Compatible & AMD FreeSync Premium Pro

name: Lenovo ThinkPad X1 Carbon Gen 11
description: The ultimate business ultrabook. Lightweight carbon-fiber weave chassis, military-grade durability, and legendary spill-resistant keyboard.

specifications.Processor: Intel Core i7-1355U vPro (10-Core, up to 5.0 GHz)

name: OnePlus 12 5G
description: Redefined flagship performance. Features the Snapdragon 8 Gen 3, a 4th Gen Hasselblad Camera System, and blazing-fast 100W SuperVOOC charging.

name: Garmin Fenix 7 Pro Sapphire Solar
description: The ultimate multisport GPS watch. Features a solar charging lens, built-in LED flashlight, advanced training metrics, and preloaded topo maps.

specifications.Battery Life: Up to 22 days in smartwatch mode with solar

name: SteelSeries Apex Pro TKL
description: The world's fastest mechanical keyboard. Features OmniPoint 2.0 adjustable switches for 11x faster response and 40x actuation customization.

name: Logitech G502 X Plus Wireless
description: Remastered gaming icon. Blends lightspeed wireless performance with brand new LIGHTFORCE hybrid optical-mechanical switches and active RGB styling.

specifications.Battery Life: Up to 120 hours (37 hours with RGB active)

name: Samsung Odyssey G9 49" Curved
description: Revolutionary ultra-wide curved gaming monitor. The 1000R curved screen matches the curvature of the human eye for maximum immersion and minimal strain.

name: Sennheiser HD 660S2
description: Audiophile open-back headphones. Designed for standard-setting detail, emotional impact, and an extended bass response that takes music to new heights.

name: Amazfit GTR 4 Smartwatch
description: Classic look with premium tracking. Features dual-band circularly-polarized GPS antennas, 150+ sports modes, and up to 14 days of battery life.
